section_title: Penalty for improper use of the word "Limited" If any person of persons trade or carry on business under any
content:
400. Penalty for improper use of the word "Limited" If any person of persons trade or carry on business under any
name of title of which "Limited" is the last word, that person or those persons shall be liable to a fine not exceeding five
hundred taka everyday upon which that name or title has been used.
